name: ms-office-ai-helper
description: AI-powered assistant for Microsoft Word with Groq and Gemini integration

scripts.clear-office-cache-win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$paths = @('$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Office\16.0\Wef', '$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Office\Wef', '$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Office\Wef', '$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Packages\Microsoft.Win32WebViewHost_cw5n1h2txyewy\AC\*'); foreach ($p in $paths) { if (Test-Path $p) { Remove-Item -Path $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ('Cleared: ' + $p) } }"
scripts.clear-webview-cache: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$webviewPaths = @('$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Office\16.0\WebServiceCache', '$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\Office\WebServiceCache'); foreach ($p in $webviewPaths) { if (Test-Path $p) { Remove-Item -Path $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ('Cleared WebView cache: ' + $p) } }"
scripts.clear-dist: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path './dist') { Remove-Item -Path './dist/*' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Cleared dist folder' }"
scripts.clear-all-cache: npm run clear-dist && npm run clear-office-cache-win && npm run clear-webview-cache
scripts.start-clean: npm run stop && npm run clear-all-cache && npm run start
scripts.sideload: office-addin-dev-certs install && office-addin-debugging start manifest.xml desktop --debug-method direct
